title: 32oz Squeeze Bottles with Caps, Happybase 5 Pack 1000ml Squeezy Sauce Bottles, Plastic Squeeze Dispensers with Measurements for Ketchup, BBQ, Sauces, Syrup, Dressings
features: Food-Grade Material - Happybase plastic squeeze bottles are made of food grade PE materials. Safe and durable.
Leak-proof Design - This squeezy bottles with nozzles, can easily control the amount of seasoning for each use by squeezing the product,prevent from over-pouring the sauce.
Widely Use - Ideal dispenser sauce bottles for ketchup, mustard, soy, lime, hot sauces, BBQ sauce, condiments, olive oil, maple syrup, mayo, peanut butter, salad dressings, etc.
Measurement Design -These squeeze bottles have a measurement indicator to control and show the dispensing condiment demand.
Customer Service Promise - Please feel free to contact us at any time when you meet problems with our products. We will handle it for you in the first time.
description: Happybase Squeeze Bottles for Sauces, 5 Pack 1000ml/ 32oz Small Squeezy Condiments Bottle with Nozzle, BPA Free,No-Leak,Suitable for Cooking,Paint,Baking,BBQ,Sauce,Hot Sauce,Olive Oil,Mayonnaise Specifications: Material: Food Grade Plastic Capacity: 32 ounce/ 1000 ml Package Included: 5 x Squeeze Bottles 24 x Black Label 1 x Pen Easy to Fill: The wide mouth opening on the bottle is great for easy filling and cleaning. And it's reusable and refillable. Spill-Proof: Attachable Caps prevents spillage and keep the contents fresh. Easy to Press: You can easily control the amount of seasoning for each use by squeezing the squeeze bottle. Multifunctional: It can be used to decorate desserts, cakes or various condiments, syrups, sauce, oils, vinegars. Also can be used for storing liquid paints or handmade soap dyes for crafts and arts.
